summary: Sixth text identified: 1 Enoch 17–18 (Second-Temple pseudepigraphal). BUT the investigation surfaced a larger material error — our WIN-031 text cites 'Genesis 1:2, Job 37:18, Isaiah 40:22, Genesis 1:6–8, Hildegard of Bingen's Scivias' as the dome's six, and the dome's actual WIN-031 entry (https://john09289.github.io/predictions/wins.html) lists a completely different set with ZERO overlap: Isaiah 14:13, Psalm 48:2, Job 26:7, Job 37:22, Ezekiel 1:4, 1 Enoch 17–18. We appear to have conflated WIN-034's firmament citations (Job 37:18) with general model-derivation scripture (Genesis, Hildegard). EXP-216 corrects the attribution, adds a Zaphon–Zion kernel-of-truth paragraph, and keeps the retrodiction + non-discriminating-archetype verdicts. Recommended: close ISS-1359 on integration, AND consider opening a separate accuracy-process issue re: future WIN analyses cross-checking citation lists against the live dome page before shipping.
